summary: P0 BLOCKER FIX Testing: Admission Control, Idempotency Protection, and Structured 429 Responses - All 14 tests passed. Backend correctly implements per-user job limits (MAX_ACTIVE_JOBS_PER_USER=2), system capacity limits (MAX_TOTAL_ACTIVE_JOBS=10), idempotency protection for all generation endpoints, and structured 429 error responses with error_code and retry_after_seconds.

critical_code_review_comments: All P0 BLOCKER FIX features are correctly implemented
Admission control (MAX_ACTIVE_JOBS_PER_USER=2, MAX_TOTAL_ACTIVE_JOBS=10) is in place for all generation endpoints
Idempotency protection prevents duplicate job creation - same key returns existing job
Structured 429 responses include error_code (USER_JOB_LIMIT or CAPACITY_EXCEEDED) and retry_after_seconds
Frontend correctly handles 429 responses with specific toast messages
Frontend sends idempotency_key with all generation requests
check_generation_capacity counts jobs across BOTH generation_jobs AND render_jobs collections
seed_data_creation: Test projects created and cleaned up during pytest execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 BLOCKER FIX features fully verified. Admission control limits: MAX_ACTIVE_JOBS_PER_USER=2, MAX_TOTAL_ACTIVE_JOBS=10. Idempotency protection uses user_id + idempotency_key lookup in generation_jobs and render_jobs collections. 429 responses have structured format with error_code and retry_after_seconds. Frontend uses genIdemKey() helper and handleGenerationError() for proper error handling.
